title: INFRAVIZ
description: InfraViz is an AI-powered multi-cloud infrastructure visualization and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) generation platform. Users describe infrastructure in natural language or drag-drop cloud services onto a visual canvas, and the AI (Claude) generates production-ready Terraform code, architecture diagrams, cost estimates, compliance checklists, and deployment guides. Reference: https://github.com/SmartTarun/Infra_viz_by_google.git
businessGoal: Showcase the power of Claude Anthropic by building a full-stack AI-enabled IaC platform

round1.iacExecution: Generate + Validate ONLY (option 1) — CONFIRMED by Tarun answer '1' on 2026-03-16T08:37:36Z. No apply/destroy in Sprint-01.
round1.uiScreens: Extracted from repo — 3 main views: Canvas, Dashboard, Terminal. Plus Login page.

repoAnalysis.appDescription: AI-powered multi-cloud infrastructure visualization and IaC generation platform
repoAnalysis.replacementBackend: FastAPI (Python 3.11+) with PostgreSQL via SQLAlchemy + Alembic
repoAnalysis.originalFrontend: React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + TailwindCSS v4 + React Flow
repoAnalysis.replacementFrontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + CSS Variables (tokens.css) + React Flow

database.replacement: PostgreSQL — expanded schema per Rasool analysis

infra: AWS (S3, DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, Aurora, CloudFront, Secrets Manager, IAM)

views.name: CanvasView
views.description: Visual drag-and-drop infrastructure designer with React Flow canvas
features: Drag-drop cloud service nodes onto canvas

views.name: DashboardView
views.description: Natural language prompt to IaC generation

round1.llmReplacement: Gemini → Claude claude-sonnet-4-6. Streaming: generateContentStream → Anthropic messages.stream with SSE.

round2.cloudInfra: AWS-only Sprint-01, us-east-1, no VPC for dev
round2.performance: Demo scale — no hard RPS targets
round2.integrations: Anthropic API for Claude. GitHub OAuth deferred Sprint-02.
round2.dataModel: 7 tables: projects, iac_templates, state_files, infra_resources, llm_conversations, deployments, drift_records

risks: LLM response quality for complex Terraform
round3.acceptanceCriteria: User can: (1) drag AWS services onto canvas and generate Terraform via Claude, (2) type NL prompt and get Terraform + docs, (3) use Terminal CLI with streaming, (4) save/load workspaces, (5) validate Terraform

arjunDecisions.llm: Claude claude-sonnet-4-6 via Anthropic API direct. NOT Bedrock Sprint-01.
arjunDecisions.stateStorage: S3 for Terraform state content, metadata-only in PostgreSQL
arjunDecisions.streaming: SSE ENABLED — TerminalView streams. Canvas/Dashboard use structured JSON.
arjunDecisions.aiPipeline: 7-step: Requirements → Architecture → Terraform → Diagram → Cost → Compliance → Deployment
arjunDecisions.frontendStyling: CSS Variables from tokens.css. NO TailwindCSS. Dark mode first.

productBrief.summary: InfraViz is an AI-powered IaC generation platform for cloud architects. Users design infrastructure visually on a React Flow canvas or describe it in natural language, and Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) generates production-ready Terraform code along with architecture documentation, cost estimates, compliance checklists, and deployment guides. Includes workspace management, Terraform validation, and a CLI terminal with streaming responses.

views.name: CanvasView
features: React Flow canvas with drag-drop AWS services

llmPipeline.systemPrompt: You are InfraViz, an expert Cloud Architect and DevOps Engineer. Generate high-quality, production-ready Terraform (HCL) code. Follow the 7-step process: 1. Parse requirements, 2. Design architecture, 3. Generate Terraform (multi-file), 4. Create ASCII diagram, 5. Estimate costs, 6. Compliance checklist, 7. Deployment guide.
llmPipeline.streaming: SSE for TerminalView. Structured JSON for Canvas/Dashboard.

techStack.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + React Flow + Recharts + react-syntax-highlighter + react-markdown + lucide-react + CSS Variables
techStack.backend: FastAPI + Python 3.11 + Anthropic SDK + SQLAlchemy async + Alembic + Pydantic v2
techStack.infra: Terraform on AWS (S3, DynamoDB, Lambda, API Gateway, Aurora, CloudFront, Secrets Manager)

personas.name: Cloud Architect
personas.painPoint: Manual Terraform writing is slow and error-prone
personas.useCase: Visual design → AI generates Terraform + docs

kpis: Generate valid Terraform from canvas in < 30s
All 3 views functional E2E with Claude
Demo-ready: dark mode, streaming, professional UI

arjun.summary: Repo analysed, product brief compiled, all architecture decisions made.

kavya.summary: Design tokens + component spec delivered. DONE.
